Top 4 Reasons NRIs in Riyadh & Jeddah Choose Bajaj Life Term Plans
Many Indians move to Saudi Arabia’s cities like Riyadh and Jeddah for work, business, or even for higher education. As the NRI population grows in these prominent cities, financial planning for families back in India becomes important.  Read More
NRIs are allowed to invest in different avenues in India to diversify their portfolios and create a corpus for their financial goals. When it comes to financial security for loved ones,  term insurance plans  from Bajaj Life come to the aid of NRIs living in Riyadh and Jeddah.
Term insurance plans are protection-oriented policies that aim to provide financial assistance to your loved ones in case of your untimely demise during the policy term. With the right term plan in place, NRIs can provide financial security to their families, whether in Saudi Arabia or back in India. Moreover, buying Bajaj Life term plans comes with its share of benefits. Let’s understand what.  Read Less
4 Reasons why NRIs in Riyadh and Jeddah choose Bajaj Life term plans  Let’s explore the top 4 ways in which Bajaj Life term plans fulfil the different needs of NRIs in Saudi Arabia –
Reason 1: INR Premiums, Saudi Rial Income  NRIs in Saudi Arabia earn in Saudi Rial, which is stronger than the Indian Rupee (INR). Since the currency of their resident country is stronger, NRIs have a higher purchasing power when it comes to  buying life insurance plans  in India. This helps them choose a suitable sum assured at affordable premiums.
Moreover, while NRIs earn in Saudi Rial, they can pay the premium in INR through their NRO (Non-Resident Ordinary) or NRE (Non-Resident External) account or through swift transaction. These accounts are INR-denominated and help them transfer their foreign income to India to pay the premiums easily.
BALIC offers competitive premiums with comprehensive coverage features making it a suitable choice for NRIs.
Reason 2: Nominee Support in India  NRIs have the flexibility to appoint a nominee of their choice If they have their family or ageing parents living in India, they can nominate them in the policy for hassle-free claims.
Resident Indian nominees can make a claim on the policy if the NRI passes away by following a simplified claim settlement process offered by Bajaj Life Insurance. With features like a 99.29%  claim settlement ratio  for the financial year 2024-25~ and 1-day claim approvals %  in non-investigative cases, Bajaj Life offers a smooth and quick claim settlement process.
Reason 3: Flexible Terms + Riders  Bajaj Life Insurance term insurance plans offers flexibility in the choice of sum assured,  policy term , premium payment term, frequency, riders, etc. This allows NRIs to have a variety of options to choose from and check which aligns with their financial goals.
Reason 4: Easy online access  One of the main benefits of buying life insurance in India is that NRIs don’t have to make a trip back home just to buy the policy. They can buy the policy from Riyadh or Jeddah through the online channels offered by Bajaj Life Insurance.
You can simply visit the company’s website, choose the term insurance plan available, fill out the online proposal form, upload the required documents and submit the proposal form for underwriting. Once the underwriting is done and the proposal is approved, pay the premium online to get the policy issued.
Conclusion  You might be an NRI residing in Riyadh or Jeddah, but your financial responsibilities might span beyond geographical boundaries. Life insurance term plans can help you fulfil these responsibilities and provide financial security to your loved ones in your absence.
So, take the first step towards financial protection and buy a term insurance plan. When looking for reputed providers, choose Bajaj Life Insurance Company, which, with its experience and expertise, can give you a hassle-free experience, both when buying the policy and at the time of claim settlement. So, choose right; gift your family protection and get peace of mind for yourself with Bajaj Life Insurance term insurance plans.
FAQs   Do Bajaj Life Insurance term insurance plans offer global coverage?  Yes, Bajaj Life Insurance term insurance plans cover you wherever you are, in the world. If you pass away during the policy tenure, irrespective of your resident country, a death benefit would be paid under the term insurance policy.
What documents would be needed to buy Bajaj Life Insurance term insurance plans?  The documentation depends on the company’s underwriting policies. However, some of the common documents needed to buy term insurance plans from Bajaj Life Insurance include the following –
Identity proof  Overseas address proof  Income proof  Copy of passport and Visa  Medical reports, if applicable, etc.  NRI questionnaire and Travel Questionnaire  PIO/OCI Card is required where applicable
The views stated in this article are not to be construed as investment advice and readers are suggested to seek independent financial advice before making any investment decisions.
